title: 'They cannot have a nuclear weapon': US pushes 15-point plan to end Iran war; sent via Pakistan
summary_full: The US has presented a 15-point proposal to Iran via Pakistan, seeking an end to the Middle East conflict. This diplomatic initiative addresses Iran's nuclear and missile programs and maritime security, even as military actions persist. Pakistan is actively mediating, offering to host talks, while Iran's response remains uncertain amidst internal challenges.
